sn38.13:1.1: "Friend Sāriputta, it is said, ‘existence, existence.’ What now is existence?"
sn38.13:1.2: "There are, friend, these three kinds of existence: sense-sphere existence, form-sphere existence, formless-sphere existence. These are the three kinds of existence."
sn38.13:1.3: "But, friend, is there a path, is there a way for the full understanding of these three kinds of existence?" sn.iv.259
sn38.13:1.4: "There is a path, friend, there is a way … this Noble Eightfold Path … ."
